channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Accused of Trying to Adopt a 'Normal Man' Persona
item.description: Democrats are seeking men who can convincingly project the image of a pastor or a working-class man.

item.title: Britain's Illiberal Mistake on Free Speech
item.description: The U.K.'s ban on Hasan Piker and Cenk Uygur is an inappropriate standard for a liberal democracy.

item.title: Could Putin Lose Transnistria as Well?
item.description: Russia's geopolitical setbacks are mounting globally.

item.title: The Climate Bureaucracy That Never Materialized
item.description: SEC's Atkins is praised for killing the climate disclosure rule early.
